name: jbp-lesson-deck
description: Build a rich Anki deck for one lesson of a "Japanese for Busy People" textbook from a USER-PROVIDED EPUB. Extracts vocabulary, Word Power sets, Key Sentences, and grammar example sentences into a two-template (recognition + production) Anki deck with kana, romaji, usage hints, and cropped textbook illustrations. Reads every page (never infers content from headings), and ends by presenting an audit table (English / Kana / Romaji / textbook page / image?) for review. Per-user romaji fixes and cross-run learnings persist in a git-ignored state home outside the plugin cache. Audio (ElevenLabs TTS) is a planned separate phase, not yet implemented.
